sections.content: Government digital document wallet linked to Aadhaar. Stores and shares verified documents. 250+ crore documents issued. 30+ crore registered users. Documents from DigiLocker are legally equivalent to originals (IT Act 2000). Free for citizens.

Documents available: Aadhaar, PAN card, Driving Licence, Vehicle RC, Class 10/12 marksheets (CBSE/state boards), Degree certificates, Insurance policies, Property documents (some states), Ration card, Voter ID, Birth/Death certificate, Caste/Income certificates. Issued by 2,400+ organizations.

Register with Aadhaar + mobile OTP. Access via digilocker.gov.in or DigiLocker app. Pull documents: select issuer org > authenticate > document fetched and stored permanently. Share: generate sharable link or QR. Accepted at airports (instead of physical ID), traffic police checks, university admissions, job applications.

DigiLocker API available for requester orgs via API Setu. Allows pulling verified documents with user consent (OAuth2 flow). Free for government departments. Endpoints: /pull (fetch doc), /verify (verify authenticity), /share (get shareable URI). SDK available for Java, Python, Node.js.
